rationale: Keep: the citing paper is a commentary explicitly built around interpreting recent replication challenges, and its note states it directly interprets Yang and Lynn (2014) alongside Frederick et al. The cited paper (DOI-matched 10.1509/jmr.14.0020) is exactly a major replication study questioning attraction-effect robustness, which is central to the citing paper’s stated research question and argument rather than an incidental mention.
